summary: Iteration 25 backend testing complete: PATCH /auth/profile/language, /api/expenses CRUD (list+search+category+total+by_category+404), Telegram /report project picker (0/1/2+ projects, callback_query for pid, __none__, and deleted-id). 22/22 tests passed. All regressions (insights, translate, help/ask, telegram status/link/code, profile/phone/verify/status) return 200.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2904 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; should be split (telegram handlers, expenses, translate/help, auth, projects) into separate modules.
/api/expenses GET filters q client-side after fetching up to 500 docs; fine for now but should push to Mongo $regex/$text as data grows.
PATCH /auth/profile/language and other endpoints return the raw user doc — consider a UserOut Pydantic model for consistent shape.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_Project_* rows for QA user during picker tests, cleaned up in fixture teardown. Created + deleted TEST_UltraTech Cement expense. Language reset to 'en' at teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Motor client binds to first event loop it sees; use a module-level persistent loop (see _LOOP in test file) instead of asyncio.run() per call — otherwise second helper call raises 'Event loop is closed'. QA user is `test-user-karya1`, chat_id 999000111, currency INR/country IN.
